overview: GYN 16 GYNECOLOGY TABLE, MECHANIC Epoxy powder painted steel structure 3-section, independent adjustments of backrest and legrest manually. Trendelenburg adjustment (optional) Synthetic leather upholstered mattress surface Adjustable rubber feet Height adjustable anatomic polyurethane leg holders Shoulder rests (optional) Support handles Removable stainless steel fluid basin. Paper roll hanger Integrated adjustable foot stool IV pole with 2 hooks mountable on both sides
